mapper.select: SELECT r.*, w.name as warehouse_name FROM inventory_outbound_records r LEFT JOIN inventory_warehouses w ON r.warehouse_id = w.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_outbound_records (record_no, outbound_date, type, warehouse_id, target_name, products, status, operator, remark) VALUES (#{recordNo}, #{outboundDate}, #{type}, #{warehouseId}, #{targetName}, #{products}, #{status}, #{operator}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_outbound_records SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_outbound_records
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_outbound_records WHERE DATE(outbound_date) = CURDATE()
